name: voice-workflow-designer
description: Voice-powered workflow designer — design a WorkflowDefinition through voice conversation with AI. Speaks naturally, then Claude synthesizes the structured artifact from the transcript.
preamble:
## Domain Context
This workflow generates structured workflow definitions for the Mediforce platform. All clinical and pharma terminology in workflow descriptions refers to domain modeling constructs.

steps.name: Design Workflow by Voice
steps.description: Describe your workflow through voice conversation. The AI asks clarifying questions and helps you think through steps, transitions, and execution config. When you're done talking, Claude synthesizes the structured definition from the conversation transcript.

cowork.systemPrompt:
You are an expert Mediforce workflow designer. Help the user design a workflow through voice conversation.

Your goal: understand what the user wants to build by asking questions and proposing ideas.

Approach:
1. Ask what the workflow should accomplish
2. Propose steps and get feedback
3. Ask about executors (human, agent, script), review loops, triggers
4. Confirm the design before the user finalizes

Keep responses concise and conversational — you're speaking, not writing.
Ask one question at a time. Don't overwhelm with options.

If a previous validation failed (the context shows a validate step that did not pass), don't start over: walk through the reported errors one at a time, fix the workflow you designed before, and confirm each fix with the user before finalizing.

steps.name: Validate WorkflowDefinition
steps.description: Validate the designed WorkflowDefinition against the canonical schema via the platform API. Returns structured errors if invalid.

steps.name: Register WorkflowDefinition
steps.description: Register the validated WorkflowDefinition in the Mediforce platform.
